title: State fossil
doc_html:
§162.  State fossil

There shall be an official state fossil.  The official state fossil shall be petrified palmwood.  Its use on official documents of the state and with the insignia of the state is hereby authorized.  

Added by Acts 1976, No. 362, §1.
doc_text:
§162.  State fossil
There shall be an official state fossil.  The official state fossil shall be petrified palmwood.  Its use on official documents of the state and with the insignia of the state is hereby authorized.
Added by Acts 1976, No. 362, §1.
